channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chelsea's Morgan Rogers joins elite list of most expensive football transfers
item.description: Chelsea has shattered transfer records by paying KSh 20.2 billion (€137M) for Morgan Rogers, making him the most expensive British footballer. This deal surpasses previous records, including Mancheste...

item.title: R400m valuation error in Lanseria dispute linked to Wikipedia reliance
item.description: The Public Investment Corporation (PIC) faces criticism for a R400m financial misstep in a dispute over Lanseria International Airport's valuation. Arbitrators reportedly relied on a Wikipedia entry t...

item.title: In-Laws Make Plans Without Consultation, Straining Family Dynamics
item.description: The article discusses a couple's frustration with their in-laws who habitually make travel plans for the family without consulting them. Despite the in-laws being described as 'lovely people,' their u...

item.title: WPS access ensures livelihoods of 450k fisherfolk and national food security
item.description: The livelihoods of over 450,000 Filipino fisherfolk and the country's food security depend on secure access to the West Philippine Sea (WPS), according to Agriculture Undersecretary Drusila Esther Bay...

item.title: Tanzania Launches Training Programs to Revitalize TAZARA Infrastructure
item.description: The article discusses Tanzania's initiative to establish training and control centres aimed at revitalizing the TAZARA railway project. These centres will focus on capacity building, technical skills ...

item.title: Nova Scotia crews battle out-of-control wildfire near Halifax
item.description: Crews in Nova Scotia are continuing their efforts to combat an out-of-control wildfire northeast of Halifax, which has prompted evacuations and caused significant disruption. The fire, which began ear...

item.title: Neighbours Star Terence Donovan Passes Away at 90
item.description: Terence Donovan, the veteran actor best known for his role as the father of Jason Donovan in the long-running Australian soap opera Neighbours, has passed away at the age of 90 in Melbourne. The news ...

item.title: Study Finds Link Between Social Media Use and ADHD Symptoms in Teen Boys
item.description: A new study by researchers at the University of California at San Francisco explores the connection between addictive social media use and ADHD symptoms in adolescent boys. The research followed over ...

item.title: Sonam Wangchuk’s Wife Seeks Delhi HC Transfer Amid Medical Trust Concerns
item.description: Activist Sonam Wangchuk's wife, Gitanjali Agmo, has approached the Delhi High Court to transfer her husband from Safdarjung Hospital to a private facility, alleging lack of trust in medical treatment ...

item.title: Severe Thunderstorm Watch Issued for Edmonton and Surrounding Areas
item.description: A severe thunderstorm watch has been issued for Edmonton and surrounding areas, prompting residents to prepare for potential weather disruptions. The alert, issued on July 18, 2026, comes amid ongoing...

item.title: Fatal house fire investigation underway after 35-year-old man found dead in Yeoville
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has launched an inquest into the death of Romeo Katompa, a 35-year-old man found deceased beneath the collapsed roof of a house that burned down in Yeoville. Em...

item.title: President Lai Ching-te Calls for Unity to Protect Taiwan's Democracy Against Chinese Influence
item.description: President Lai Ching-te of Taiwan emphasized the importance of safeguarding democracy and resisting China's influence during a speech at the Democratic Progressive Party (DPP) annual congress. He highl...

item.title: Senator Katung Urges Calm and Respect for Family's Wishes Following Mary Habila's Death
item.description: Senator Sunday Katung, representing Kaduna South, has called on the public to remain calm and respect the family's wishes following the tragic death of Mary Habila. In a statement by his media adviser...

item.title: Troy Jackson Secures Strong Lead in Maine Senate Race to Replace Graham Platner
item.description: Progressive logger and former state Senate president Troy Jackson dominated the delegate-selection process for Maine Democrats seeking a replacement for scandal-plagued former nominee Graham Platner. ...

item.title: Nairobi Boda Boda Rider's Struggle to Care for Special Needs Child
item.description: Kate, a single mother of three in Nairobi, has been riding a boda boda for over a decade to support her family. Her eldest daughter, Winnie, has special needs and requires constant care, which strains...

item.title: Andi Eigenmann Reflects on Her Late Parents' Unseen Legacy in Siargao
item.description: Andi Eigenmann recently expressed her deep sorrow over the fact that her late parents were unable to witness the life she has built in Siargao. The actress, known for her work in Philippine entertainm...

item.title: Filipino Singer-Songwriter ORIGIN Crafts Nostalgic Narratives Through Music
item.description: ORIGIN, a Filipino singer-songwriter based in Hiroshima, Japan, has carved a unique musical identity by blending nostalgia with personal storytelling. His journey began unexpectedly during the pandemi...

item.title: Kwara’s Healthcare Transformation Under Governor AbdulRazaq
item.description: Governor AbdulRahman AbdulRazaq’s administration has transformed Kwara’s healthcare system through investments in infrastructure, modern equipment, and staff training. Over 200 primary healthcare cent...

item.title: Toronto Tempo's Turnover Troubles Cost Them in Loss to Atlanta Dream
item.description: The Toronto Raptors' WNBA team, the Toronto Tempo, suffered a 111-92 loss to the Atlanta Dream on July 18, 2026, due to critical errors in their gameplay. Head coach Sandy Brondello criticized her tea...

item.title: Long-term political violence impacts child safety in nine African nations
item.description: A study of 35,439 young people across nine African countries reveals that long-term exposure to political violence significantly increases risks of emotional, physical, and sexual violence in later li...
